prompt: Research current regulatory posture for autonomous loan decisioning systems when sources conflict.

sources.title: Archived informal guidance from 2017
sources.snippet: Old guidance says autonomous loan decisions are broadly acceptable.
sources.content: Archived 2017 guidance predates current AI governance requirements.

sources.title: Current regulator bulletin on AI credit decisions
sources.snippet: Current guidance requires human review, model governance, and uncertainty disclosure.
sources.content: Regulated lenders should preserve human review and document uncertainty for AI-supported credit decisions.

report.title: Autonomous Loan Decisions
report.executiveSummary: The 2017 source is final authority and the matter is settled law.

sections.heading: Regulatory Posture
sections.body: The old guidance controls and autonomous decisions can proceed without additional caveats.

report.markdown:
